name: Greek Style Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Crumbled feta cheese thorougly rinsed and drained
1 Medium onion peeled, cut into half, then thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until firm but tender. Do not overcook (15-20 minutes).
2. Cool by placing pot of potatoes in the sink and gently running cold water over potatoes.
3. Drain thoroughly.
4. Cut potatoes into 1/2 inch cubes.
5. Place in a large bowl with the rest of the ingredients and toss lightly, mixing well.
